assertion_results.text: Output includes a liveness endpoint at /healthz that does NOT check database or Redis connectivity
assertion_results.evidence: Created a single /health endpoint that checks database connectivity. No separate liveness endpoint. The health check includes a database ping, which violates the liveness principle.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a readiness endpoint at /readyz that checks both PostgreSQL and Redis with individual status per dependency
assertion_results.evidence: No /readyz endpoint. Only a single /health endpoint exists. No distinction between liveness and readiness.

assertion_results.text: Output includes a startup endpoint at /startupz that verifies initialization completion
assertion_results.evidence: No startup endpoint created. Only a single /health endpoint exists.

assertion_results.text: Health check responses include structured JSON with status, individual check results, and version information
assertion_results.evidence: Health response is { status: 'ok' } or { status: 'error', message: err.message }. No individual check breakdown, no version, no uptime.

assertion_results.text: Metrics are exposed at /metrics endpoint in Prometheus exposition format using a Prometheus client library
assertion_results.evidence: No /metrics endpoint created. No Prometheus client library used. Monitoring is done via console.log statements.

assertion_results.text: RED metrics are implemented: request rate counter (http_requests_total), error counter, and duration histogram with appropriate bucket values
assertion_results.evidence: No Prometheus metrics implemented. Request logging uses console.log with timestamp and duration but no counters, histograms, or Prometheus format.

assertion_results.text: A metrics middleware is created that automatically instruments all incoming HTTP requests with method, path, and status_code labels
assertion_results.evidence: A logging middleware is created that logs method, path, status code, and response time to console. While not Prometheus metrics, it does instrument all requests.

assertion_results.text: OpenTelemetry tracing configuration is generated with W3C Trace Context header propagation (traceparent)
assertion_results.evidence: No OpenTelemetry configuration generated. No tracing setup. Request ID is generated using uuid but not propagated via W3C headers.
